inputs.label: Vehicle Mass
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the vehicle including driver and fuel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the vehicle including driver and fuel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürücü ve yakıt dahil aracın ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des Fahrzeugs inklusive Fahrer und Kraftstoff.

inputs.label: Engine Power
inputs.businessContext: Maximum engine power output at the crankshaft.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum engine power output at the crankshaft.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Krank milinde maksimum motor gücü çıkışı.

inputs.label: Drivetrain Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Combined efficiency of transmission and drivetrain (0-1). Typical values: 0.8-0.9.

businessContext_i18n.en: Combined efficiency of transmission and drivetrain (0-1). Typical values: 0.8-0.9.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şanzıman ve aktarma organlarının birleşik verimliliği (0-1). Tipik değerler: 0,8-0,9.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kombinierte Effizienz von Getriebe und Antriebsstrang (0-1). Typische Werte: 0,8-0,9.

inputs.label: Target Speed
inputs.businessContext: Final speed to achieve from standstill. Default is 60 mph.

businessContext_i18n.en: Final speed to achieve from standstill. Default is 60 mph.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Durağan halden ulaşılacak son hız. Varsayılan 60 mph.
businessContext_i18n.de: Endgeschwindigkeit, die aus dem Stand erreicht werden soll. Standard ist 60 mph.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
